transcript.text:
(Can't stop screaming!)
(A giant aged yellowtail is here!)
(Length 103cm)
(Width 34cm)
- This is 16kg - Oh my!
(A 16kg yellowtail is getting sliced!)
(You're gonna eat the whole thing...)
(by yourself?!)
(16kg yellowtail disappearing fast)
(I can do nothing but scream!)
You're a small person
but you eat so much!
(I'm back with yellowtail this winter as well!)
Hello, everyone
Today,
I came here to eat yellowtail!

You gotta eat yellowtail in the winter!
So last year,
I ate live yellowtail
(Soraepo-gu Yellowtail EP on 01.27.22) (10kg yellowtail at Soraepo-gu last year)
Today, I'm here to eat aged yellowtail
It's an apartment complex!
There is always a great restaurant in an apartment complex
I heard they have amazing aged yellowtail
So I came all the way to Songdo, Incheon
I asked them to age a really big yellowtail in advance
So I'll eat as much as I can today
and I'll share the rest
with the staff
('Chonnom Hoetjip' in Ongnyeon-dong, Yeonsu-gu, Incheon) I see it! It looks amazing!
(Discovered something) It says 'Aging yellowtail' here
(Aging yellowtail) Wow, amazing!

(Unbelievably big aged yellowtail..) It's like a huge chunk of meat
Is this mine? Whoa... Awesome
It's aging right now
- Hello - Oh?! Hello
(Owner is here) I'm a fan
Really? Thank you
Is this mine?!
Oh yes, this one!
(Huge) The biggest one? How many kg is it?
- This is 16kg - Oh my
(It's too big to hold...) In the morning...
It's so big....
- It must be heavy - I came at 6am
(Aged yellowtail that's been aged since the morning) and started to age it in advance
It's so big... Look at this, wow
- Let's go - Yes!

Where...?
- It's very smart - Wow!
(How big is it...?) What what what
(Coming soon) This is so big!
(It's hard to stand with it...) This is around 13kg
So big...
(Are you okay, sir?)
(Shaking) Are you okay? Do you need help...?
(I'm sorry, go back and rest...)
Its belly sticks out like this
We call these pig yellowtails
(It definitely looks like a chubby yellowtail) Chubbier the better!
(I'll take you inside) I'll make it delicious for you
- Thank you - Yes!
(A big one is coming)
How many cm is this?!

- Measuring tape?!?! - I'll measure it
103cm
(Are you 130cm?) There's only a 30cm difference
- The width... 34cm - 34cm? The belly?
That's bigger than me.. Haha
(Cutting starts now!) I'll cut it now
If you see the oil, you'll be surprised
It's as big as tuna
(It's getting cut so smoothly..!)
(The whole body is already separated...!)
(Is it that easy..?) It looks easy because you do it well
You have experience(?)
(Shaking head) I can never do that
(Giant flatfish on 06. 13. 21) (Just chopping it however back then)
(But this aged yellowtail has been cut so quickly)
(Time to slice it)

(Finished cutting) Thank you
(Complete) Amazing
There are a total of 12 parts of yellowtail
This middle one is...
a very special part!
It's gill belly fat!
- Gill belly fat? - Yes, it's known as the most delicious part
This one...
It's the neck part, it's a special cut where you only get 4 pieces from one fish
- This is the cheek part! - Cheek part!
You also only
get 4 pieces with 1 fish
This is..
the rib part!
(Rib part)
And this is the eye part

- What about this? - And this is head
This is the belly button part!
- This is the back part - Back part
- This is the inner part - Inner part?
- The side part! - Side part!
- Belly part - Belly part
(Confusion) There are a total of 12 parts
(Yellowtail body parts : Belly button, head, gill belly fat, rib, eye, neck, cheek, belly)
(back, inner, and side)
15 servings?!
- This is 15 servings? - Yes, around 15 servings
(6 seafood side dishes are served with the main dish) There are about 6 kinds of seafood, would you like to try?
- I'll let you know if I need more - Yes, let me know
(Finished explaining) Enjoy!
Thank you
Wow, I'm so excited

Bon appétit
I'll try the most delicious part
But what if I eat the most delicious part
and the other parts seem not as good?
(Don't worry) That won't happen, right?
I'll try the most delicious part
(There are too many different parts) This is the gill belly fat, right?
I don't remember
I'll try the gill belly fat
I'll dip it in the oil sauce
I'm so excited!
(In heaven)
Is this heaven?
Hang on...
It's so delicious
(Applause)

Wow, it's so good!
The texture is like the neck part of tuna
The gill part
It has that crunchy texture
Whoa, it coats my mouth with oil
but it's so delicious
Wow, how is the texture like this?
(With the ssamjang as well) This is so good!
I like dipping it in here
(Dip)
It's so delicious I'll save one piece for later
This is the head part!
(Uncertain) Right?
(Head part) I'll dip this in the oil sauce
(Stammering because it's too delicious.. Haha) This is definitely.. Uh...uh....
It's less oily than the gill belly fat part

but the texture
is so good
The texture
is very crunchy
(It's rather crunchy than just soft...) It's not like the typical fish texture
(Can't explain) It's really... I can't describe it
The oil that comes out is really good
It doesn't feel too greasy
It's very flavorful
Eye part!
(Eye part!) It kinda looks like yukhoe, like beef brisket
Wow, it's like eating really tender yukhoe
(Squishy) This is soft and squishy
Wow, look at the oil!
What was this one?
I also forgot.. Haha

(Excuse me)
Cheek part...
I'll try the cheek part
Its chewy texture is amazing
This one was crunchy
but this is chewy
They're all different
I'll try the rib part
Rib part!
(Making a fuss)
And
Belly button part?
With a little bit of wasabi
Wow, the oil...
The oil comes out
(The oil comes like a wave...!) like juice...

It fills up my whole mouth
Even when I add a lot of wasabi...
(Amazing)
I was so curious about this one
Side meat!
They slightly grilled it with the torch
(Surprised)
It's so good
It's like..
You know cow liver? It has a great texture
but some people can't eat it because it's quite smelly
(But everyone will like this) This has a similar texture like the cow liver
Let me try the inner part
Wow, this is so soft
It's so soft
(A group of customers came to eat, haha)

Wow!!
(Impressed)
(I can never eat like her...) I can never do that!
Although I like it a lot,
it's hard to finish even one whole plate..
Wow, haha
What was this one?
(Who are you?)
(Beyond the brain power) Back part!
Oh, this is the back part!
Since it's the back part,
it's less oily
than other parts
but since the yellowtail itself is quite oily,
they're very oily
I've never had back part that's this oily before!

Belly part!
My favorite belly part!
How can it taste so good like this...?
I'm going to make nigiri with it
(Self-made yellowtail nigiri) With flying fish roe, belly, and soy sauce!
Just a little bit of soy sauce!
This is amazing...!
It's like eating nigiri at a really fancy sushi restaurant
Since it's been aged,
it tastes more luxurious
(8-hour aging made it more flavorful) and has the savory smell as well!
Of course, each of them has its own charms...
but aged yellowtail is really delicious as well!
By the way...
would I get a yellowtail hotpot as well?
(I want something spicy now...) It'd be good to eat with a hotpot when there is still some left!

Right, yellowtail is perfect with white kimchi
(Yellowtail + white kimchi + seaweed = Amazing combination!) and seaweed...
That's how I usually eat tuna
It's so good!
(Slipped)
(Oh dear...)
(Goodness, my sashimi) 5-second rule doesn't apply since it fell on the ground..
(My precious 2 pieces of yellowtail...) What a waste
It's worse because it's 2 pieces
That's how oily it is
This is so slippery
If I hold it like this,
(Slipping) it just slips away, so slippery
(Saving the cheek part for later) I'll save it for later
I'll add
ssamjang here

Wasabi as well
Flying fish roe as well
(Passed) This is so good!
Excuse me, I was wondering if you could
also make a hotpot with the yellowtail bones?!
Yes!
(Ordering the hotpot) Then can I have one hotpot please..?
- Okay - Thank you
I have to make room now
(Trying to rearrange for the hotpot...)
(Hotpot is here) Thank you!
(Hotpot is a must when eating hoe) It looks so yum!
It's a bit oily
so I ordered this hotpot as well
It looks so yum!
Wow, it's so refreshing!

Dipping it like this
I got an idea
I can blanch it in the soup!
(It's yellowtail shabu-shabu..!)
I blanched it slightly
I'll try it now
Oh, it feels
so different!
How should I describe it?
It's still oily
but the texture is just in between raw and cooked fish
Something like that...
It's an interesting texture
Wow, the side part will be
perfect to put in the soup
Shall I?

(Swoosh swoosh)
The color changed!
It changed from the beef steak color
(Is this really fish...?) to pig liver color
It's so good!
Some parts are delicious to eat after cooking a bit
and the other parts are good raw
Dive in
I'm gonna add the half of it
Oh, I think it'll go well with sesame leaf as well
It goes perfect with the sesame leaf
(It's not beef soup) Let's take it out now
It looks just like beef! Beef brisket!
(It just melts in the mouth..!) It just breaks and disappears in my mouth
Wow
It just melts and disappears

- You're amazing! - No
(She ate 8 servings so far...)
I want to blanch the other parts as well
(Back part) This
(Inner part)
The colors are all different
when I cook them
It's fascinating
(The back part is white!) It became white!
Yellowtail is so soft when you cook it
It just melts in the mouth
Should I try the inner part?
It's so good!
(Baby customer)
(Mischievous look)
What do you think about her eating?

(I like it)
This this this
It's super-tasty to eat it cooked!
I'll try to make yellowtail hotpot with this
(The hotpot became more flavorful with the addition of yellowtail)
It's so soft
that it just breaks
Wow, it's so delicious
Wow, the aged yellowtail
is better than anything
is better than anything
especially in the beginning
but since it's a bit oily, I get sick of it
so I'll add them in the soup like this
Cheek part
I saved it earlier

I'll dip it in the oil sauce
It's so good!
Wow, the fish is fully cooked now
It's overcooked that it just broke everywhere
(Give me my yellowtail back...) I thought I added a lot..?
Maybe it's under the bones
(So many bones)
It's quite dry since I cooked it for a long time
It's so firm
I'll go back to hoe again
and try the original taste of the yellowtail
With the flying fish roe like this
It's so delicious to eat it with the fish roe
A lot of fish roe this time
The meat broke in the soup, right?
(The broken pieces made the hotpot more tasty..!) But I like it because the soup got more of a texture now

It's delicious!
Wow, but
the side part is the best for cooking in the soup
(It looks amazing as well...) It tastes as good as it looks
(Everything went in the soup) I just want to put them in here, it tastes better this way!
Belly part!
I think I can add this much wasabi
for the belly part!
I'll try it like this
It's not spicy....!!
Wasabi defeated the oily taste
With a big piece of garlic!
(It's the side part..!) Oops, it broke...
No!!
It breaks so easily now..
I looks just like beef

I know what it tastes like now
It's mackerel with..
(Please calm down...)
Should I eat this as well?
I'll eat the rest as hoe!
(You can talk without moving your lips..) It's so delicious
It cooked very well!
I...
I always do a yellowtail mukbang in the winter
(Eating a year's worth of yellowtail at once..) It feels like I'm eating a year's worth all at once
(Just eating her meal, not filming) Why is the mic like this?
(You have to make a reservation at this restaurant for dinner) You have to book in advance
It's so popular during dinner time
(Yellowtail catching days, Tuesdays and Thursdays) Tuesdays and Thursdays are the days that they catch yellowtail
I think there are more customers on those days
(Complete) Done

I had such a nice meal today
Ahhhhh!! Really!!!
Whoaaa!!!
Wow, this is amazing!!
People are shocked that
you ate one whole yellowtail
(Shocked) She ate the whole thing by herself?
You're a small person
but you eat so much!
You look a little bit different in person
(Oh...) Really?
- You look so much better! - Really?
(He's so humorous..! LOL) Thank you!
You didn't even drink?
(Mukbang expert?) I mean, if I really put my all in it...
I can probably eat 2 servings haha
(Thank you for your humor..!) Thank you!
